## AI Phone Responder

**Trigger:** Webhook from VOIP (CallTools / Twilio) when a call comes in outside business hours or all agents busy.

**TODO:**
1. Classify call intent (new lead, existing client, status check)
2. Generate voice response with Claude + TTS
3. Collect callback info or route to voicemail
4. Create task in Favorble for follow-up
